title: Create duplicate rows of same item in multiple groups with different views
excerpt: Upon Status change, I want to copy a single item (a client case) into three different groups.  There are three streams of work being done concurrently, so I need a different view for each group.  When the item status is …

posts.author: Sue_Menard1 (Sue Menard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upon Status change, I want to copy a single item (a client case) into three different groups. There are three streams of work being done concurrently, so I need a different view for each group. When the item status is complete in all three groups, I need to automate the movement of a single item to the Next stage of the workflow.

Has anyone done something like this. I’m even willing to consider a third party app if it will make it possible.
Many thanks

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! How are you?

Wow… It sure is a complex workflow.

I’ve managed to make something to the first part (dupicate and move)

image1139×283 19 KB

The result is this:

image417×632 19.6 KB

But for the last part, with the “complete” status in all three groups, I just can’t imagine how to do it. I’ll still trying thoug.

Hope I’ve helped…

Best regards,
